name: repolens-skill
description: Lightweight code graph Skill for project memory, context packs, and evidence-backed performance reports.

scripts.demo: npm run demo:index && npm run demo:context && npm run demo:report && npm run test
scripts.check: node --check repolens-perf/scripts/index_project.mjs && node --check repolens-perf/scripts/trace_module.mjs && node --check repolens-perf/scripts/build_context_pack.mjs && node --check repolens-perf/scripts/perf_report.mjs && node --check repolens-perf/tests/perfgraph.test.mjs
